cover.subtitle:
12·12로 빼앗고,
5·18로 응답받다.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wide low-angle view of Gwangju Geumnamno street with a tall granite memorial spire (5·18 memorial) silhouette in the distance. FOREGROUND: a single white camellia bloom resting on the ground. Color palette: cold gray + concrete white + a single crimson accent on the camellia. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 12·12 사태. 전두환 등 신군부 권력 장악.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 8차 개헌의 핵심(7년·단임·간선제), 5·18 기록물의 유네스코 등재, 3저 호황의 3요소, 최저임금 위원회(1987) 설립 시점이 잘 출제된다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of a memorial spire and a single white camellia bloom (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
